meta.title: Les Espanters | World Music Duo Montpellier. Oud, Guitar & Banjo | Concerts Hérault
meta.description: Les Espanters, instrumental duo based in Montpellier. Mediterranean and Oriental music for concerts, festivals, weddings and private events in Hérault and Occitanie. Oud, electric guitar, banjo.
meta.keywords: concert Montpellier, musical duo Hérault, live band Occitanie, event musician Montpellier, world music Montpellier, oud Montpellier, oriental music Hérault, private concert Montpellier, wedding live music Hérault, festival Montpellier, Mediterranean band, instrumental music event
meta.ogTitle: Les Espanters | World Music Duo Montpellier
meta.ogDescription: Instrumental duo based in Montpellier. Concerts, festivals and private events in Hérault and Occitanie. Oud, electric guitar, banjo. Mediterranean and Oriental music.

music.title: OUR MUSIC
music.description: Electric guitar fused with traditional oud, acoustic guitar married to banjo! A unique soundscape that travels from desert to mountains. Instrumental music composed in Montpellier, perfect as background music in restaurants or explosive on stage with rock sounds!
music.imageAlt: World music duo live Montpellier oud guitar banjo concert

booking.title: FOR WHOM?
booking.description: World music festival, private concert, bohemian wedding, corporate event, restaurant or private individual: our musical platform will seduce you! Discover our unique sound universe blending world, arabesque, western, folk and blues.
booking.imageAlt: Private concert Montpellier wedding corporate event live band

story.title: BASED IN MONTPELLIER
story.locationText: Professional musical duo based in Montpellier in Hérault. We perform for your events throughout Occitanie: Montpellier, Nîmes, Béziers, Sète, Toulouse, Perpignan and surroundings.
story.storyText: Two musician neighbors who became friends, sharing games, beers and laughter! Music came naturally. Seeking a unique sound born from their opposite musical horizons, they explore rhythms, scales, silences and tensions. On stage, pleasure comes first! 💛

media.pageDescription: Listen to original tracks and watch videos from Les Espanters, Mediterranean instrumental duo from Montpellier.
media.heading: 🎶 SONGS & VIDEOS 🎶
media.subheading: Stream or download our original tracks and videos
